Spec: ~1500W 120V nichrome on mica former; element pack 1.5in wide x 6in long (measured 2026-05-07)
Source: Harbor Freight Warrior heat gun SKU 56434
Notes: Teardown completed 2026-05-07. Element pack measured 1.5in x 6in. Drives HTR-CAN-001 length to 178mm (7in) — see baseplate-layout.md §3.3. A1 rejected — element extracted and mounted in custom heater can per DR-002. Still TODO before commissioning: measure element cold resistance (target ~9.6 ohm for 1500W/120V) and photograph mounting-tab geometry for HTR-CAN-001 fabrication.

Spec: Universal AC ~1-4A draw at 120V; bypass-cooled; cylindrical body 6in dia x 6in tall (measured 2026-05-07)
Notes: DR-011 supersedes DR-003. In hand 2026-05-07. Body geometry measured: 152 x 152 mm vertical-axis cylinder. Mounted on rear angle-iron extension off the deck rear edge per baseplate-layout.md §3.1. Bypass-cooling confirmation, no-load draw, and CFM-vs-conduction-angle characterization remain on the TP-001 worklist (sourcing-notes.md). Speed control via BLW-CTRL-001 TRIAC dimmer; airflow interlock via CT-001; frame earth-bonded via BOND-001. Static-pressure headroom is huge (20-80in WC) — characterize at TP-001 to find operating duty-cycle range, not whether it meets spec

Spec: AC light dimmer module 8A with on-board zero-cross detector; logic-level PWM input + ZC output (RobotDyn-style)
Source: Amazon — Genuine RobotDYN PWM AC dimmer 110-220V w/ heatsink B071X19VL1
Notes: DR-011: ESP32 GPIO 23 → PWM in (gate trigger); GPIO 4 ← ZC out (interrupt). Genuine RobotDYN 1-channel module — 3.3V/5V logic, 50/60Hz, includes heatsink. BTA16-class TRIAC; rated for ~8A continuous on inductive loads. Drive with RBDdimmer.h or roll-your-own ZC ISR + phase-angle scheduler. 4-channel alt B07NDW2F3F if multi-zone control ever needed. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B071X19VL1

Spec: ZMCT103C 5A split-core CT module with burden + bias network
Source: Amazon — HiLetgo 3pcs ZMCT103C 5A AC current sensor w/ op-amp B0CDWWYLMQ
Notes: DR-011: replaces implicit blower_is_running() check from DR-003. Clamp on one motor lead. Output AC riding mid-rail to ESP32 GPIO 34 ADC; firmware computes RMS for airflow interlock threshold. HiLetgo board has onboard precision op-amp + biasing — output is voltage (not raw 5mA secondary), directly ADC-readable. 3-pack gives 2 spares. 1000:1 ratio, 0.2% linearity, 3000V isolation. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CDWWYLMQ

Spec: X-cap line-to-neutral + Y-caps to earth; 6-10A inline module
Source: Amazon — uxcell CW4L2-10A-T 115/250V 10A EMI filter B016EISSGE
Notes: DR-011: contains conducted EMI from TRIAC switching + brushed-motor commutation. Mandatory for SPI signal integrity. CW4L2-10A-T is a chassis-mount terminal-block filter (common-mode choke + X+Y caps); install inline on motor leads between fuse bus and BLW-CTRL-001. Earth lug on case must bond to chassis ground. Salvage from a dead PC PSU input stage is a no-cost alternative if available. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B016EISSGE

Spec: Mixed-bore clamp-on ferrite cores (4mm-10mm cable diameters); set of 5-10
Source: Amazon — IEUYO 22-pc clip-on ferrite kit 5 sizes 3/5/7/9/13mm B07DPM44BV
Notes: DR-011: install on motor leads (between TRIAC and motor) and on every TC SPI cable run. Brushed motor + TRIAC switching is a significant EMI source — E13 shielded cable is necessary but not sufficient on its own. 22-pc kit covers 3-13mm cable diameters — fits TC SPI cables (small) and motor leads (larger). Snap-on, no soldering. Plenty of spares. 70-pc alt B0CP5Q2KLP if more inventory needed. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07DPM44BV

Spec: M4 or #8 ring terminal + matching screw / star washer; green/yellow stranded pigtail 14 AWG
Notes: DR-011: universal motors have nontrivial leakage current — frame must be bonded to mains earth. Ring terminal under a frame screw with a star washer for positive metal-to-metal contact

Spec: 25A 120V AC load / 3-5V DC control
Notes: Drive via NPN buffer from 5V rail (E7); add RC snubber across output (E10); add thermal fuse as independent backup. 3-32V DC input / 24-380V AC out. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07FVR37QN

Spec: ESP32-DevKitC clone
Notes: Hardware WDT enabled in firmware (E1/F2). Single-board listing; 2-pack alt B09KLQF4RR. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0718T232Z

Spec: SPI K-type
Notes: Total ~$12-18; use shielded cable to reduce SPI noise near SSR switching (E13). Order 3 individual units (cheaper than 3-packs). Alt: HUABAN B083R5F3FF. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07K5MJ43M

Spec: SS sheath probe K-type 3mm OD
Notes: Post-heater pre-plenum placement; compression fitting mount (M9). 6in long 0.118in (3mm) 316SS sheath quick-disconnect K-type up to 500C. Order qty 3 of this listing for TC-001/002/003. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B078QS3NWP

Spec: SS sheath probe K-type 3mm OD
Notes: Side-entry lower chamber; compression fitting mount (M9). Same listing as TC-001. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B078QS3NWP

Spec: SS sheath probe K-type 3mm OD
Notes: Exhaust stream above chamber; compression fitting mount (M9). Same listing as TC-001. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B078QS3NWP

Spec: 1/8in compression fitting 1/8 NPT to 1/8 OD
Notes: Positive sealing and strain relief for TC probes (M9). Pack of 2 — order 2 packs for 4 fittings (3 needed + 1 spare). 304 SS double-ferrule. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09FF7LRL6

Spec: 5V 2A USB charger
Notes: Old phone charger; must be isolated (all modern ones are)

Spec: 20A 120V inline (was 15A — DR-013 D4)
Notes: DR-013 D4: bumped to 20A. Heater 12.5A + universal-AC motor 1-4A = 13.5-17A peak; 15A breaker trips at the high end and exceeds NEC 80% continuous (12A) at any motor load. Pair with 12 AWG WIRE-001 and PLUG-001 (NEMA 5-20). Required circuit is a 20A branch — see PLUG-001 notes for safety-label text.

Spec: 120V 15A DPST toggle or rocker
Notes: E8: Must be double-pole (switches both L and N) to protect against reversed cord polarity. Must be accessible during operation

Spec: 228C one-shot (240C accepted)
Notes: Mounts on heater can body; independent last-resort cutoff if SSR fails shorted. NEC SEFUSE 240C 10A axial — 228C unavailable from major sellers in singles. 240C is 12C above target but well below nichrome failure; acceptable per safety-critical substitution review. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B015675DA8

Spec: 192C one-shot
Notes: E6: Mounts in heated airstream downstream of element. Lower rating than THFUSE-001 and lower thermal lag — trips faster on no-airflow overheat. AUPO BF192 10A axial. 10-pack — keep spares for replacements after trips. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FJ5WJM9Z

Spec: 2N2222 or similar TO-92
Notes: E7: Buffers ESP32 3.3V GPIO to 5V for reliable SSR triggering. Kit covers 2N2222 and many other useful TO-92 BJTs. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B071KK9B3H

Spec: 1k ohm 1/4W axial
Notes: E7: Limits base current for Q2 NPN buffer. ELEGOO 17-value 1% kit covers a wide range — keep on hand for incidental needs. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B072BL2VX1

Spec: 47 ohm 2W
Notes: E10: RC snubber across SSR output — suppresses inductive spikes. Metal oxide flame-proof axial 5%. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07V2NV3P9

Spec: 0.01uF 275VAC X2-rated film cap
Notes: E10: RC snubber across SSR output — must be X2-rated for mains use. 275VAC X2 = equivalent safety class to 400VDC for mains snubber duty. 103K 10mm pitch. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09JWZ5MWQ

Spec: 2.5 in OD 304 SS exhaust pipe 12 in length
Notes: Standard exhaust size; ~2.37 in ID. T3: L/D ~1.0 — slugging risk; 3.0in may be preferred. Local auto parts pickup

Spec: 3.0 in OD 304 SS exhaust pipe 12 in length
Notes: Standard exhaust size; ~2.87 in ID. T3: L/D ~0.57 — better fluidization geometry. Local auto parts pickup

Spec: 3.0 in OD borosilicate glass cylinder ~8 in (down from 10-12 in target)
Notes: A3: Visual feedback on fluidization and roast development. Borosilicate 3in dia x 8in tall open-end chimney/lampshade. NOTE: 8in is shorter than original 10-12in target — verify expansion-chamber transition still clears bean bed. Handle with care — thermal shock risk. Test alongside SS tubes. 2-pack alt B075ZQFFK4. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B06XJT46QL

Spec: 8in dia x 6in tall black stovepipe section + 3 slip-fit pipe caps (1 bottom + 2 swappable tops drilled to 2.5in and 3.0in chamber OD respectively)
Source: Sourced 2026-05-04 — 2ft black pipe + 3 caps in hand
Notes: DR-012 + DR-013 D3: 3 caps map to 1 permanent bottom + 2 swappable tops (one per chamber size) for the DR-001 dual-chamber test. PRE-USE GATES (DR-013): (1) verify pipe is bare/oxide-blackened mild steel — NOT galvanized HVAC duct. Zinc outgases at exactly our 200C operating temp. Galvanized = stop and re-source. (2) M7 cure-burn outdoors with propane torch until rolling-oil film stops smoking, before any food-path roasting. (3) Do NOT drill the 2.5in side-entry hole-saw until HTR-001 teardown is complete and HTR-CAN-001 outlet geometry is known — side-entry position depends on heater can length. Top caps: drill one to 2.5in chamber OD, one to 3.0in. Each is the clamp-ring substrate for its chamber size (DR-008). Bottom cap retained with 3 sheet-metal screws + high-temp RTV at the seam.

Spec: 2in automotive exhaust flange (mild or stainless steel); ID ~2.0in OD ~3.5-4in; drill 3 fresh M4 tap holes in face. Fallback: 1/8in SS plate annular ring cut to OD ~4in ID 2.0in
Source: Auto parts store (AutoZone/O'Reilly) — pick up alongside CHAM-001A/B exhaust pipe stock; SS plate offcut as fallback
Notes: DR-008 + 2026-05-02 geometry correction (Option A). Ring ID 2.0in < chamber ID 2.37in so ring's inner face supports PLATE-001A (dia 2.37in) from below — plate drops inside chamber and rests on ring face. Chamber 2.5in OD passes through 2.5in cap hole; bottom rim sits on same ring face around the plate edge. 2in exhaust flange ID matches our target directly and is heat-rated for continuous exhaust use (massively over-spec at 200C). Factory bolt holes are oversized clearance (3/8in or 7/16in) — not M4-tappable; drill 3 fresh M4 tap holes elsewhere on the flange face. Tapped ring (M4 screws from above through cap face) preserves DR-008 ring+plate swap without breaking DR-012 bottom-cap RTV seal. 2-bolt flanges are most common; 3-bolt OK if available. Mild steel flange is fine for our temps; stainless is optional/cosmetic. M3: fender washers under cap-side screw heads

Spec: 2.5in automotive exhaust flange (mild or stainless steel); ID ~2.5in OD ~4-4.5in; drill 3 fresh M4 tap holes in face. Fallback: 1/8in SS plate annular ring cut to OD ~4.5in ID 2.5in
Source: Auto parts store — same trip as PLEN-002 + CHAM-001A/B; SS plate offcut as fallback
Notes: DR-008 + 2026-05-02 geometry correction (Option A). Ring ID 2.5in < chamber ID 2.87in; supports PLATE-001B (dia 2.87in) from below. Same exhaust-flange rationale as PLEN-002 — 2.5in flange ID matches our target ring ID directly. Drill 3 fresh M4 tap holes; ignore factory clearance holes. Swap pair with PLATE-001B for 3.0in chamber. Each chamber size also requires its own top cap (drilled to chamber OD); cap is part of the swap unit. M3: fender washers under cap-side screw heads

Spec: Fiberglass stove rope 1in dia
Notes: M8: Changed from ceramic fiber to fiberglass — ceramic fiber sheds respirable particles. High-temp seal between clamping ring and underside of top pipe cap face (DR-008 + DR-012). 7ft is more than needed; 9ft alt B01ETVGA22 / 20ft alt B01ETVSP5W. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01ETURR0M

Spec: ~2-3in OD SS tube stub ~2in long
Notes: M2: Welded or press-fit through pan wall hole. Prevents pan wall deformation under hose clamp load. Use hose clamps inside + outside

Spec: Perforated SS sheet 4in dia disc with 1/16in holes (cut to ~2.37 in)
Notes: DR-013 D1: run as-is at 22% open area. 4in 19-gauge 304 SS round disc with 1/16in holes. Cut to 2.37in for CHAM-001A. 22% open is well above the conventional fluid-bed sweet spot but is now characterizable via PRESS-001 dP measurement. If TP-001 stage 1 measures plate dP too low or shows channeling: install MESH-001 disc on top (Plan B). DIY-drilled custom plate at 4% open area held as Plan C. DR-013 D2 plate-float check: at 22% open, actual operating plate dP is far below 1in WC, so plate weight (~23g) is comfortably above actual lift force (~5gf). Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09SF15S47

Spec: Perforated SS sheet 4in dia disc with 1/16in holes (cut to ~2.87 in)
Notes: DR-013 D1: same handling as PLATE-001A. Cut to 2.87in for CHAM-001B. Order 2 of the FengYoo listing total to cover both chamber sizes. MESH-001 disc cut to 2.87in is the staged Plan B. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09SF15S47

Spec: SS sheet ~3x4in bent to 45deg
Notes: Pop-riveted to inside of cylindrical plenum wall opposite side-entry; redirects jet to plenum floor (DR-009 + DR-012). Curved wall vs flat — ramp seats on a chord; small edge standoff is immaterial. T2: If TP-001 shows uneven fluidization add second perforated baffle ~1in below distributor plate (6in plenum height has explicit headroom)

Spec: ~4in OD x 5in tall SS cylinder or can
Source: Thrift store / restaurant supply (no good Amazon match)
Notes: Step-up from chamber OD; chaff settles by velocity drop (DR-006). Look for SS flatware caddy / utensil cylinder / coffee tin / SS cup at thrift. No clean Amazon listing matches 4in dia x 5in tall in pure SS at low cost — defer to thrift hunt

Spec: 30 mesh 304 SS woven sheet ~4in dia disc cut
Notes: Cut from sheet; fits inside top of expansion chamber (DR-006). T8: May clog with chaff oils — plan for mid-roast cleaning or test coarser mesh. Sheet is large — plenty for spares. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09VNSQGVH

Spec: All-stainless worm-drive clamp sized to joints
Notes: M11: Must be all-stainless (not zinc-plated) for temperature tolerance. Covers blower-to-can heater-can-to-plenum and expansion chamber joints

Spec: Sheet metal cone from chamber OD to ~4in expansion chamber OD
Notes: M6: Transition from roast chamber to expansion chamber. Hose clamp at each end

Spec: 3 set screws or spring clips
Notes: M4: Chamber tube must not be held by gravity alone — vibration or bump will tip it. Set screws through clamping ring or spring clips

Spec: 12in x 18in steel deck (cut from 12in x 24in sheet 2026-05-07) + 1in-class angle iron stock for perimeter, rear motor extension, and front electronics-tray extension
Notes: Deck cut to 12in x 18in for the air-train zone (Zones B + C). Remaining 6in of stock + offcuts reserved for the angle-iron extensions per baseplate-layout.md §1: ~6in rear extension carries the motor (Zone A, off-deck); ~5in front extension carries the electronics tray (Zone D, off-deck). Total assembly length ~29in. Frame is 1in-class angle iron on the long edges + cross-members at deck rear, deck front, and outer ends of each extension. Tripod pattern from DR-013 mounts through the deck and extensions. M1 stiffening rationale unchanged

Spec: 2.5in OD 304 SS exhaust pipe ~6-8in long
Notes: M5: Build from exhaust pipe. Mount element via mica former tabs. Insulate exterior with ceramic fiber or fiberglass wrap. Local auto parts pickup

Spec: 14 AWG stranded THHN or similar (12 AWG if using 20A circuit per E5)
Notes: Do not cheap out - must be properly rated

Spec: 22 AWG silicone hookup wire (6 colors); shielded cable for SPI runs near heater (E13)
Notes: Keep physically separated from mains; use shielded cable for TC amplifier SPI bus (separate purchase or salvage). 6 colors x 26ft each. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07G2JWYDW

Spec: Ring spade fork butt crimp assortment 22-10 AWG
Notes: Insulated terminals red/blue/yellow for full AWG range. Link: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01GAESOWA

Spec: Cord grip / cable gland for mains entry
Notes: Do not skip - mains cord pulling loose is a real hazard

Spec: SS bolts nuts fender washers backing strips M4/M5 or #8/#10
Notes: Sized to final mechanical design. M3: Include fender washers and backing strips for clamping ring bolts

Spec: Any hot-air popcorn popper
Notes: A4: Roast on a popper first to calibrate operator senses (first-crack sound roast progression fluidization feel) before building the custom roaster

Spec: 40-mesh 304 SS woven cloth - 2 discs cut to 2.37in and 2.87in
Source: Amazon — 40 mesh 304 SS woven cloth (any reputable seller)
Notes: DR-013 D1: staged on-hand backup for distributor plate. Pre-cut 2 discs (one per chamber) and hold. Install over PLATE-001A/B if TP-001 stage 1 measures plate dP too low (channeling) or visually uneven fluidization. Mesh count steps 40 -> 60 -> 80 roughly double dP at each step — easy reactive iteration. Captive between chamber bottom rim and perforated plate per DR-008 stack.

Spec: Sensirion SDP810-500Pa I2C diff pressure sensor; +/-500 Pa (+/-2in WC) range
Source: Sensirion / Digi-Key / Mouser; Amazon equivalents available
Notes: DR-013 D5: enables quantified plate dP and bed dP measurement. I2C bus shared with future expansion - no GPIO pin pressure on ESP32. Add dP_plate channel to Artisan stream. Tap pairs reconfigurable across plate / bed / mesh via PRESS-TAP-001. 0.1% accuracy class is overkill for our needs but gives margin for transient measurement.

Spec: 4-6x small barb fittings (~1/8in) + silicone tubing 1/8in ID 6ft
Notes: DR-013 D5: pressure taps through plenum wall (above and below distributor plate) and chamber wall (above bed). Reconfigurable — single PRESS-001 sensor can read plate dP or bed dP by swapping tubing. Silicone for thermal tolerance up to ~200C. Through-wall barbs sealed with high-temp RTV.

Spec: Vane-style anemometer 0-30 m/s 3% accuracy class
Source: Amazon — generic handheld anemometer (BTMETER BT-100 class)
Notes: DR-013 D5: one-time exhaust CFM spot-checks during TP-001 characterization. Held at exhaust outlet; CFM = velocity x outlet area. Not logged. 3% accuracy is fine for characterization. Used to ground-truth the SDP810-derived flow estimate (plate as orifice flow meter once Cd is calibrated).

Spec: 3x 5/16in or 3/8in threaded rod ~24in long; matching nuts/washers; SS or zinc-plated; chamber clamp band
Notes: DR-013 cross-cutting: tip-resistance strategy. 3 rods through baseplate at tripod points. Below baseplate: nuts + washers as adjustable feet for leveling. Above baseplate: rods continue up past the air-train height to a horizontal cross-piece or chamber band clamp around the cone reducer (EXH-004) or upper chamber. Replaces the briefly-considered chamber-drop-through plenum geometry. Final rod length set once chamber stack is assembled.

Spec: NEMA 5-20P plug body for 12 AWG cord (T-shaped neutral blade)
Notes: DR-013 D4: v1 requires a 20A circuit. Replaces standard 5-15 plug. Pair with 12 AWG cord (E5 / WIRE-001). Build-level safety label near cord: 'Requires 20A circuit (NEMA 5-20). Do not plug into a 15A receptacle.' Do not use 5-15 plugs or 5-15-to-5-20 adapters — combined heater + motor load will trip 15A breakers.
